description: Letter fragment from a certain Yosef, in al-Maḥalla. In Judaeo-Arabic. Seems to be sent to a woman (תבעתי לי). The address is "to the shop of the cantor Bū Yaʿaqov, who is to deliver it to his brother, who is to deliver it to his [mother/father]." The sender requests a shipment of various garments including a turban.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-al-Maḥalla. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
